overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk bar (the Afterlife) from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit interiors with green holographic displays, pool tables, and scattered patrons. The camera walks along the main bar counter, transitions through a holographic display area to a back lounge, then returns through the main floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: main bar corridor with Afterlife counter

agents.ego_description: walking along the main bar counter, observing the Afterlife signage and bartenders serving drinks

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter preparing drinks
patron sitting on a bar stool at the counter

entered.detail: long curved bar counter with neon green trim and illuminated Afterlife signage
tall cylindrical glass tanks containing green holographic brain displays
illuminated grid pattern ceiling with green neon lighting
metal bar stools lined along the counter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along the main bar of the Afterlife, a cyberpunk establishment with prominent green neon lighting. The bar counter stretches along the right side with patrons seated on stools, while holographic display columns are visible further down the corridor.

events.description: turns right at the end of the bar, moving from main corridor toward the back lounge area

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking past the holographic display tanks toward the back lounge

notable_agents.action: patron in yellow jacket standing near the wall looking at a screen

entered.detail: doorway leading to the back lounge area with pool tables
digital screens displaying advertisements on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the end of the bar, transitioning from the main corridor into a narrower passage lined with holographic display tanks on the right. The space becomes more enclosed as it approaches the back lounge area.

scene_state.functional_zone: back lounge with pool tables and window seating

events.description: approaches a group of NPCs sitting and standing near the large windows
turns around to face back toward the main bar area

agents.ego_description: exploring the back lounge, observing patrons by the pool table and windows, then turning around to return

notable_agents.action: performer standing on a raised platform entertaining seated patrons
man leaning against wall near the large window

entered.detail: illuminated pool table with balls and cues arranged for play
floor-to-ceiling windows with green tinted glass overlooking the city
benches and seating areas with neon underlighting along the windows
small elevated stage area for performers

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the spacious back lounge featuring a pool table on the left and lounge seating along large windows on the right. A performer stands on a raised platform entertaining several seated patrons. The space is dimly lit with green neon accents. The camera then turns around to begin the return journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: main bar area with glass enclosed booths

events.description: passes the holographic tanks again while returning to the main bar area on the opposite side

agents.ego_description: walking back through the bar on the opposite side from the entrance, passing glass enclosed booths and returning toward the main floor

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow pants standing near a glass booth

entered.detail: transparent glass enclosed seating booths with neon lighting for private gatherings
posters and advertisements on the walls near the booths

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the return journey through the main bar area on the opposite side from the initial path, featuring glass enclosed booths on the left. The camera passes the holographic display columns again and returns to the main floor area with the Afterlife bar visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through the neon-lit interior of the Afterlife bar, moving from the bustling main counter into a secluded lounge before returning to the open floor. It begins by gliding along the main bar counter where patrons sit under prominent green neon lighting, passing holographic display columns that line the corridor. As the camera reaches the end of the bar, it turns right into a narrower passage flanked by holographic tanks, transitioning from the wide main hall into a more enclosed space. The scene then opens into a spacious back lounge featuring a pool table and a performer on a raised platform, before the camera pivots to begin a return journey. Finally, the view shifts back through the main area, passing glass-enclosed booths and the holographic columns once more as the distant bar counter comes back into view.
